expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Case focus coverage (advisory)” it explicitly states the benchmark focus and then enumerates distinct coverage areas: “Label visibility outcomes”, “Label density outcomes”, and “Overlap-sensitive outcomes”, including collision/overlap handling examples and the requirement that “These distinctions must appear as separate scenarios with observable leaves.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The output describes the phase4a contract but does not provide the required phase4a artifact. It concludes: “Fail (insufficient artifacts to evaluate phase4a requirements). Reason: … does not include any Phase 4a output artifact (e.g., `drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r1.md`) … to verify that the orchestrator produced a Phase 4a subcategory plan…”. Without an actual phase4a draft, alignment cannot be demonstrated.
